As mentioned, Intuitive is the maker of the da Vinci, a robotics system used for many minimally invasive procedures, from hernia repair to hysterectomy and gastric bypass surgeries, just to name a few.  The latest version, the da Vinci 5, has been used for more than 40 different procedure types so far.

Intuitive Surgical is Known for Selling $1 Million Surgical Robots. But Heres How it Actually Makes Most of its Revenue. Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ: ISRG), best known for its flagship da Vinci robot, is the global leader in the robotic surgery market.  The da Vinci, available in several versions including the latest da Vinci 5, generates billions of dollars of revenue annually, and this performance has helped the companys stock soar over the near term and the long term.  Considering da Vinci models cost more than $1 million, you would expect this robotic surgery giant to generate most of its revenue through the sales of these platforms.
